# cloudru-community_subnet (Resource)

Cloud.ru subnet (managed via Compute API).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `default_gateway` (String) Gateway IP address within the subnet.
- `name` (String) Subnet name (1–64 chars, must start with a letter).
- `subnet_address` (String) CIDR address of the subnet (e.g. 192.168.0.0/24).
- `vpc_id` (String) ID of the VPC this subnet belongs to.

### Optional

- `availability_zone` (Block List) Availability zone where the subnet is placed. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--availability_zone))
- `default` (Boolean) If true, this subnet is the default subnet in its availability zone.
- `description` (String) Subnet description (0–255 chars).
- `dns_servers` (List of String) List of DNS server IP addresses.
- `project_id` (String) Project ID. Defaults to the provider project_id.
- `routed_network` (Boolean) If true (default), the subnet is routed; if false, it is isolated.
- `tags` (Block List) Tags attached to this subnet. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--tags))

### Read-Only

- `can_delete` (Boolean) Whether the subnet can be deleted.
- `created_time` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC 3339).
- `id` (String) Subnet ID.
- `interface_count` (Number) Number of network interfaces attached to this subnet.
- `modified_time` (String) Last modification timestamp (RFC 3339).
- `state` (String) Current subnet state (e.g. created, creating, deleting).
- `type` (String) Subnet type (e.g. regular, vpc, technical).

<a id="nestedblock--availability_zone"></a>
### Nested Schema for `availability_zone`

Required:

- `id` (String) Availability zone ID.

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) Availability zone name.


<a id="nestedblock--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Required:

- `id` (String) Tag ID.

Read-Only:

- `color` (String) Tag color.
- `name` (String) Tag name.
